# Stylish Names

> Stylish Names (stylish-names.com) is a free Unicode stylish name and fancy text generator. Type any name or word and instantly get 1000+ copy-and-paste font styles, symbols, and decorations for gaming profiles, Instagram, TikTok, WhatsApp, Discord, and more. Everything is real Unicode, so it works on any device with no app or sign-up. It also publishes original guides on making stylish names, choosing fonts, and gaming nicknames.

## Core tools

- [Stylish Name Generator](https://stylish-names.com/): Main tool — type a name and browse hundreds of fancy font styles to copy and paste.
- [Cursive Font Generator](https://stylish-names.com/tool/cursive): Elegant handwriting-style script fonts.
- [Gothic Font Generator](https://stylish-names.com/tool/gothic): Dark, medieval blackletter text.
- [Bold Text Generator](https://stylish-names.com/tool/bold): Heavy bold Unicode for bios and posts.
- [Small Text Generator](https://stylish-names.com/tool/small): Tiny small-caps, superscript, and subscript text.
- [Aesthetic Font Generator](https://stylish-names.com/tool/aesthetic): Vaporwave full-width and dreamy soft fonts.
- [Glitch / Zalgo Text Generator](https://stylish-names.com/tool/glitch): Corrupted, cursed glitch text.
- [Bubble Text Generator](https://stylish-names.com/tool/bubble): Circled and filled bubble letters.
- [Symbol Keyboard](https://stylish-names.com/tool/symbol-keyboard): Browse and copy decorative and game-safe symbols (꧁ ꧂ ☬ ★ ⚡).
- [Style Builder](https://stylish-names.com/tool/style-builder): Combine a font with decorative frames and symbols automatically.
- [Invisible Text Generator](https://stylish-names.com/tool/invisible-text): Blank/invisible Unicode characters.

## Popular name styles

- [Gaming Names](https://stylish-names.com/gaming): Stylish names for PUBG, Free Fire, COD, and more.
- [Cute Names](https://stylish-names.com/cute): Kawaii names with hearts and flowers.
- [Cool Names](https://stylish-names.com/cool): Trendy cool fonts and symbols.
- [Fancy Names](https://stylish-names.com/fancy): Elegant decorative script fonts.
- [Attitude Names](https://stylish-names.com/attitude): Bold, boss-style attitude names.
- [Stylish Names for Boys](https://stylish-names.com/boy): Cool and dashing boy names.
- [Stylish Names for Girls](https://stylish-names.com/girl): Cute, beautiful, aesthetic girl names.
- [Couple Names](https://stylish-names.com/couple): Romantic matching name pairs.

## Names by platform

- [Instagram](https://stylish-names.com/instagram): Stylish bio and display-name fonts.
- [TikTok](https://stylish-names.com/tiktok): Trendy TikTok display names.
- [WhatsApp](https://stylish-names.com/whatsapp): Stylish profile names and status.
- [Free Fire](https://stylish-names.com/free-fire): FF stylish names and symbols.
- [PUBG](https://stylish-names.com/pubg): Stylish PUBG nicknames.
- [BGMI](https://stylish-names.com/bgmi): Stylish BGMI nicknames.
- [Discord](https://stylish-names.com/discord): Cool Discord usernames.
- [Roblox](https://stylish-names.com/roblox): Stylish Roblox display names.
